task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map viewport shows Easter Island (a triangular island in the ocean). Alternatively, the search bar shows 'Easter Island' or the coordinates '-27.1127, -109.3497'.

task_completion.description: Disable required overlay layers (Labels, Borders, Roads, 3D Buildings)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Layers' sidebar panel, the checkboxes for 'Borders and Labels', 'Roads', and '3D Buildings' are unchecked/empty. The map view appears clean without text labels or yellow road lines.

task_completion.description: Orient the camera to a top-down (nadir) view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view of the island is flat and 2D-like, not tilted or showing the horizon. The compass or navigation controls usually indicate a north-up, top-down orientation.

task_completion.description: Frame the complete island within the viewport
task_completion.visual_evidence: The entire triangular shape of Easter Island is visible within the map window boundaries, with ocean surrounding all sides. No part of the island is cut off.

task_completion.description: Set export resolution to at least 1920x1080
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Image' toolbar or options menu is visible, showing a selected resolution of '1920x1080', '1080p', or higher (e.g., 'Maximum', '4K').

task_completion.description: Save the image to the specified path and filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog is visible showing the destination directory '/home/ga/exports/' and the filename 'easter_island_basemap.png' before clicking Save, or a terminal/file manager view confirming the file's creation.

integrity.description: Agent used the Google Earth Pro GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Google Earth Pro interface (globe, sidebar, toolbar) rather than a script or command-line tool downloading tiles.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the map manually
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor or focus highlights are visible on map controls, search bars, or layer toggles, indicating active usage of the software.

integrity.description: Agent did not download a pre-existing image from a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen using a web browser (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) to search for 'Easter Island satellite map' images and saving them directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Easter Island (-27.1127, -109.3497). Visual features: Distinct triangular island shape with three main volcanic peaks. Required disabled layers: 'Borders and Labels', 'Roads', '3D Buildings'. Target resolution: 1920x1080 or higher. Output path: /home/ga/exports/easter_island_basemap.png.
